scripts.build: vue-tsc -b && vite build && npm run generate:og-image && npm run prerender && npm run check:seo
scripts.format: oxfmt src scripts README.md index.html package.json vite.config.ts tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.node.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check src scripts README.md index.html package.json vite.config.ts tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.node.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json
